title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: BLUE JAY HEALTH CENTER JEWELL SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 83874 OR-103 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Varies, call for information. Some SBHC are for students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district, and others are open to the general public. Hours: Clinic: Monday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-3pm Mental Health: Tuesday/Thursday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-3pm (800) 244-4870 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 244-4870 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BLUE JAY HEALTH CENTER JEWELL SCHOOL SBHC
